description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The exterior is predominantly white with large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house features a driveway with two parked cars and a green lawn area, as well as a partially covered outdoor patio or terrace at the rear. The structure appears to have three above-ground stories, with the top floor partially open or featuring a rooftop terrace. The main entryway is located on the side facing the driveway, marked by a simple door and a paved walkway. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, three-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and a green lawn, featuring a minimalist design and outdoor patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway with two cars, vertical window strips, and the main entryway.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large patio/terrace area, extensive windows, and a wide green lawn.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the driveway, green lawn, and a clear look at the patio and rear stairway.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main facade, driveway, entryway, and a series of large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with paved walkway, no porch, minimal overhang, and direct access from driveway
